scope: B8.3 label-balanced / case-control randomized-audit contract -- PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (committed + hash-pinned BEFORE the Phase-B run).
status: development-only | NOT confirmatory | NOT deployable | NOT validation (Lee2019 SM16 emulator) | NO tag
authorized: reviewer-authorized 2026-07-07 after B8.2 FALSIFIED B8.1's decision-level stability (prior_only 18/300 + cov_plus_prior 13/300 both fail <=7/300; the prior-bearing nulls retain a collider/mean-T residual that B8.1's studentized both-gate only masked, unstably). B8.3 is a CONTRACT redesign, NOT gate/p/statistic tuning; mean-T recalibration was explicitly rejected.

core_redesign.principle: address label-prior with the AUDIT SAMPLING CONTRACT, not statistical masking. A predeclared, deterministic, Z-blind CASE-CONTROL selector balances the audited sample so P(Y|C) is equal by construction; the EXACT null RE-APPLIES the same selector under every randomized assignment C*.
core_redesign.vs_b8_1: B8.1: class/prior balance attempted via design_class Dc + the studentized both-gate; the observed-Y/prior residual survived (B8.2 falsified stability). B8.3: the audit sample itself is label-balanced by predeclared case-control sampling; the FIRST-ORDER prior main effect is removed by sampling, and the null includes the selection process.
core_redesign.honest_scope_design_redteam_wrznv3lin: count-balancing removes the FIRST-ORDER P(Y|C) main effect EXACTLY (C x Y imbalance==0, verified). It does NOT by construction remove two residual prior channels -- (a) SELECTION-INTENSITY asymmetry: observed-C carries the prior so the selector discards more trials than under randomized C* (observed selected_n < null mean; real SM16 3872 vs 4191, non-overlapping); (b) within-Y C-Z dependence: stratifying on the COLLIDER Y opens a C-Z path count-balancing does not close (within-Y E[Zproj|HI]-E[Zproj|LO] ~ -0.15/-0.22 despite exact count balance). Both are the SAME family that failed B8.2. Whether they re-inflate prior_only/cov_plus_prior is EMPIRICAL -- exactly what the mean-T-alone<=7/300 PRIMARY screen measures. This is a genuine test, NOT a guaranteed fix. NOT overclaimed as 'prior removed at the statistic level'.

narrowed_estimand: label-balanced AUDIT-POPULATION boundary evidence -- condition-specific boundary/interaction evidence in a predeclared label-balanced audit sample. NOT a natural-prevalence deployment concept certificate. Prior shift is OUT of the estimand (removed by the sampling contract), not a nuisance the statistic must absorb.

audit_selector.function: audit_select(C, Y, G, Block, seed) -> mask
audit_selector.rule: within each (subject, block, audited-label Y) stratum, select k=min(#C==HI, #C==LO) trials from EACH condition (per-stratum seeded choice) -> selected audit sample has EQUAL per-condition label composition (P(Y|C) balanced) by construction
audit_selector.properties: predeclared, DETERMINISTIC (per-(subject,block,label) seeded so tie-breaking is independent of C and re-applicable identically under any C*), hash-pinned via the module. Infeasible stratum (k=0) contributes nothing; empty selection -> INSUFFICIENT_LABELS; observed C x Y imbalance != 0 -> SAMPLER_INVALID (must be EXACTLY 0).

exact_null: for observed C: apply A(C,Y) -> observed T on the balanced audit subset. For each within-(block,Dc) randomized C* (reuse B8.1 resample_C_exact_b8_1): RE-APPLY A(C*,Y) -> recompute T* on the NEWLY-selected balanced subset. The null distribution = randomized assignment + deterministic label-balanced selection + same B3 contrast T. If A(C*,Y) is infeasible under a draw -> fail-closed (count invalid), NO silent drop. NO fitted Y|Z, NO fitted C|Z propensity.

decision.B8_ALERT: contract_valid AND estimable (n_exact_invalid<=0.20*n_boot) AND p_exact_meanT<=0.025 AND p_exact_stud<=0.025 AND n_eligible>=20 (B8.1 both-gate, on the audit subset)
decision.meanT_alone: estimable AND p_exact_meanT<=0.025 AND n_eligible>=20 -- NOW A PRIMARY SCREEN (not just diagnostic): B8.3 must control the mean-T gate itself on prior-bearing nulls, not merely mask it with the studentized gate
decision.no_retuning: do NOT change any gate/threshold based on prior_only or POS results

two_phase.phase_A: protocol + design red-team + SMALL feasibility smoke (n=8/condition, base 774e6). Feasibility ONLY, NO science verdict. Gate: selector balanced (imbalance==0 exact) + feasible (enough post-audit eligible subjects) + CONTRACT reach computed-T + VIOLATION refuse + low null-infeasible-draw rate.
two_phase.phase_B: IF Phase A passes hard feasibility: locked n=300/condition diagnostic replay (6 fresh disjoint seed blocks x 50), same 12-condition panel.

phase_B_seeds.disjointness: must be 0-intersection with all prior CSC seeds (<=611e6); verified before run

screens_preregistered.no_pooling: each NULL kind separately; no pooled safety claim
screens_preregistered.cov_plus_prior: B8_ALERT <= 7/300 AND meanT_alone_alert <= 7/300 (PRIMARY -- both gates; must retain mixed control)
screens_preregistered.violations: B8_ALERT <= 7/300 each AND CONTRACT_INVALID_OR_UNIDENTIFIABLE dominates; quiet_cov_plus_concept success = REFUSE (invalid contract), NOT alert-because-concept-exists

if_b8_3_fails: PRE-REGISTERED (design red-team wrznv3lin): if prior_only OR cov_plus_prior meanT_alone_alert (or B8_ALERT) breaches <=7/300 -> do NOT gate-tune, do NOT alter the selector/statistic/null to match intensities. The PREDICTED mechanism is the residual prior channel (selection-intensity asymmetry + within-Y C-Z via the collider Y) surviving count-balancing -- the SAME family that failed B8.2. Read a breach as 'label-balanced audit sampling is insufficient under this statistic (the collider residual survives)'. NEXT (reviewer) = B9 genuinely randomized audit data/acquisition, OR estimand narrowing (declare prior-bearing worlds outside the target). NOT now. The merge reports the selection-intensity asymmetry so a breach is diagnosed as this residual, not a coding fault.
hard_stops: null FIXES the observed selected subset instead of re-applying A under C*
mean-T residual remains high but hidden behind the both-gate
state counts do not sum to n
